compiled_state.title: Add sub-agent guard to 9 sub-agent dependent skills
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Add a SUB-AGENT-GUARD block to the preamble of each of these 9 skills: sprint, debug-everything, brainstorm, preplanning, implementation-plan, design-wireframe, design-review, roadmap, plan-review.

The guard block goes immediately after the YAML frontmatter closing ---, before the # Title heading. The exact pattern:

<SUB-AGENT-GUARD>
This skill requires the Agent tool to dispatch sub-agents. Before proceeding, check whether the Agent tool is available in your current context. If you cannot use the Agent tool (e.g., because you are running as a sub-agent dispatched via the Task tool), STOP IMMEDIATELY and return this error to your caller:

"ERROR: /dso:<skill-name> cannot run in sub-agent context — it requires the Agent tool to dispatch its own sub-agents. Invoke this skill directly from the orchestrator instead."

Do NOT proceed with any skill logic if the Agent tool is unavailable.
</SUB-AGENT-GUARD>

Replace <skill-name> with the actual skill name for each file (sprint, debug-everything, etc.).

## TDD Requirement

Task 1 (4ba5-1dc2) provides the RED test. After adding guards, the 9 tests for these skills should turn GREEN.

## Files to modify

- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/design-review/SKILL.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/plan-review/SKILL.md (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 9 SKILL.md files contain the SUB-AGENT-GUARD block
  Verify: for s in sprint debug-everything brainstorm preplanning implementation-plan design-wireframe design-review roadmap plan-review; do grep -q "SUB-AGENT-GUARD" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/$s/SKILL.md || exit 1; done
- [ ] Guard block appears before the # Title heading in each file
  Verify: for s in sprint debug-everything brainstorm preplanning implementation-plan design-wireframe design-review roadmap plan-review; do awk '/SUB-AGENT-GUARD/{found=1} /^# /{if(found) exit 0; else exit 1}' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/$s/SKILL.md || exit 1; done
- [ ] Each guard references the correct skill name in its error message
  Verify: for s in sprint debug-everything brainstorm preplanning implementation-plan design-wireframe design-review roadmap plan-review; do grep -q "dso:$s" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/$s/SKILL.md || exit 1; done
- [ ] Tests from Task 1 pass for all 9 guarded skills
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh 2>&1 | grep "PASSED:"
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — test exists from 4ba5-1dc2) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — 18 PASSED (9 skills × 2 tests each), 18 FAILED (expected RED tests for Story 3459-7246)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All 3 AC criteria pass for all 9 skills. 18 tests GREEN (2 per skill). No bugs discovered outside scope.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Added SUB-AGENT-GUARD blocks to all 9 skills (sprint, debug-everything, brainstorm, preplanning, implementation-plan, design-wireframe, design-review, roadmap, plan-review). Tests: 18 pass.
